title: pg chart values (enum guards)
description: Partial schema: constrains the values whose typos silently misconfigure HA. additionalProperties stays open so the rest of values.yaml is unconstrained.

failoverMode.description: repmgrd (default) or the lease-based Go agent.

backend.description: Leadership store: the Kubernetes Lease API (default) or etcd.

keyType.description: shared = static keys from existingSecret; auto = cloud workload identity / instance credential chain.
